title: Bee Removal in Bethpage, NY | $350–$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Bethpage, Long Island. Safe, humane bee extraction from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350–$550 flat-rate service.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout Bethpage, Long Island, protecting homeowners and businesses from unwanted bee colonies. Our trained technicians safely remove bees from residential properties, commercial buildings, and the historic structures that make Bethpage unique. With flat-rate pricing between $350 and $550, you'll know the cost upfront with no hidden fees.
whyUs: As Long Island's trusted pest control specialists, we bring years of experience to every Bethpage bee removal job, using humane methods that prioritize both your safety and environmental responsibility. Our licensed technicians arrive promptly, assess the situation thoroughly, and complete most bee removals the same day.
localContext: Bethpage's mix of mid-century homes near the famous Bethpage State Park and older properties around the historic downtown area can attract bee colonies seeking shelter in eaves, attics, and wall voids. The proximity to green spaces like Bethpage Community Park means bee activity increases during spring and summer, making professional removal services essential for Long Island residents.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Bethpage property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day bee removal service for most Bethpage locations. Our technicians typically complete the removal process within 1-3 hours depending on colony size and location accessibility.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350–$550 bee removal price?
faqs.answer: Our flat-rate pricing covers complete bee colony removal, nest extraction, treatment of the affected area, and initial exclusion work to prevent re-infestation. The final cost depends on colony size, location difficulty, and structural access requirements.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them in Bethpage?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we use humane relocation methods to preserve beneficial bee populations. However, if the colony poses immediate danger or relocation isn't feasible due to colony health or aggressive Africanized bee presence, safe extermination may be necessary.

faqs.question: Are bee removal services safe for my family and pets in Bethpage?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and proven safety protocols to protect your family, pets, and property during the entire bee removal process. We provide clear instructions for any temporary precautions needed during treatment.
